_purpose: AC-5 conc-16 lever: graph-safe blocked-top-k design timing (61L, bs16, seq4096, maxlen163840). Picks the design that reduces the residual full-width topk over-scan.
note: A = current production merge (full width). B caps context (live-only). C is the no-context-cap win but needs a Triton within-block top-2048 + skip kernel. Cprime shows torch-blocked w/o a skip kernel is worse than monolithic. implied step uses R17's measured 36.9ms step / 12.5ms selection.
